visual_strategy.editing_style: clean cuts, readable subtitles, no fast flashing, no copyrighted music required

shooting_rules: Shoot horizontally with a phone or camera.
Record each clip 2-3 seconds longer than needed for editing flexibility.
Use subtitle overlay for every scene so the video is understandable without voiceover.
Avoid visible private data, student IDs, chat windows, passwords, API keys, and unapproved faces.
Use official department name as text only; do not use logo or emblem unless permission is confirmed.

scenes.visual_goal: Quickly connect computer science with making ideas work.

shot_list.shot: Close-up of a laptop opening or hand reaching for keyboard
shot_list.note: Use natural desk light if possible.

shot_list.shot: Close-up of typing on keyboard
shot_list.note: Avoid showing private screen content.

shot_list.shot: Over-the-shoulder view of safe demo code or a simple UI
shot_list.camera: over shoulder, screen slightly blurred if needed
shot_list.note: Use mock code or a local sample file.

scenes.subtitle: 在資訊工程的學習裡，一個想法可以從草稿開始，慢慢變成真的能運作的系統。
scenes.transition: fast cut into campus identity scene
scenes.fallback_visual: Animated code-like lines and title card generated by Python/PIL.

scenes.visual_goal: Make the subject clear: National University of Tainan CSIE.

shot_list.shot: Wide campus or building exterior shot
shot_list.note: Use a clean establishing shot.

shot_list.shot: Walking shot toward classroom, hallway, or study space
shot_list.note: Avoid close-ups of uninvolved people.

shot_list.shot: Clean background with department title text overlay
shot_list.note: Text can replace logo.

scenes.subtitle: 從程式設計出發，我們學習分析問題、拆解需求，並用技術做出清楚的解決方法。
scenes.transition: cut on motion to learning fields
scenes.fallback_visual: Text title card with self-made technology nodes.

scenes.visual_goal: Show what students learn without making unverifiable claims.

shot_list.shot: Screen showing simple programming or demo interface
shot_list.note: Use non-private sample code.

shot_list.shot: Whiteboard with AI / Data / System / Network keywords
shot_list.note: Handwriting adds real classroom feeling.

shot_list.shot: Notebook, textbook, or flowchart insert
shot_list.note: Avoid copyrighted textbook pages in close readable detail.

shot_list.shot: Student operating demo or data visualization
shot_list.note: Focus on process, not specific unverified equipment.

scenes.subtitle: 課程不只是在寫程式，也包含資料處理、人工智慧、系統設計、網路與各種實際應用。
scenes.fallback_visual: Five self-made cards: Programming, Data, AI, Systems, Network.

shot_list.shot: Two or three students discussing around a laptop
shot_list.note: Use only people who agree to appear.

shot_list.shot: Finger pointing at demo screen or flowchart
shot_list.note: Frame hands and screen if faces are not needed.

shot_list.shot: Whiteboard project planning or system diagram
shot_list.note: Keep content generic and safe.

shot_list.shot: Short demo or presentation-style clip
shot_list.note: Can be a mock interface.

scenes.subtitle: 透過專題實作和團隊合作，我們把課堂上的知識轉換成可以展示、可以改進的作品。
scenes.fallback_visual: Self-made workflow diagram and collaboration nodes.
safety_notes: Do not show confidential project data

scenes.visual_goal: Show the realistic process of debugging, review, and improvement.

shot_list.shot: Terminal or editor showing safe debug output
shot_list.note: Crop out username, folder path, and tokens if visible.

shot_list.shot: Paper checklist or sticky notes
shot_list.note: Use generic checklist text.

shot_list.shot: Discussion or whiteboard revision
shot_list.note: Faces optional; hands and board can be enough.

shot_list.shot: Run/save action after editing code
shot_list.note: End with a successful or calm visual.

scenes.subtitle: 每一次討論、測試和除錯，都是累積經驗的過程，也讓作品更接近完成。
scenes.transition: fade or clean cut to ending
scenes.fallback_visual: Debug console, review checklist, and iteration arrows generated by Python/PIL.

scenes.visual_goal: End with a clear and positive department identity.

shot_list.shot: Campus wide shot, hallway empty shot, or laptop closing shot
shot_list.note: Choose the cleanest footage for a calm ending.

shot_list.shot: Final title card with Chinese department name and NUTN CSIE
shot_list.note: Use text only, no unauthorized logo.

scenes.subtitle: 在這裡，我們用程式連結創意與實作，讓資訊能力成為面向未來的力量。
scenes.fallback_visual: Clean title card generated by Python/PIL.

ai_video_generation_prompts.prompt: A cinematic close-up sequence in a modern university classroom: a student's hands open a laptop, fingers type on a keyboard, and a computer screen shows clean sample programming code with no private data. Subtle blue technology light reflections, focused academic mood, realistic Taiwanese university setting, natural desk lighting, shallow depth of field, smooth camera push-in, 16:9 horizontal video, no logos, no brand names, no readable private information, no cyberpunk hacker stereotype.
ai_video_generation_prompts.negative_prompt: no passwords, no API keys, no private chat windows, no school logo, no exaggerated sci-fi, no hacker mask, no random English text errors, no distorted hands, no extra fingers
ai_video_generation_prompts.caption_overlay: 在資訊工程的學習裡，一個想法可以從草稿開始，慢慢變成真的能運作的系統。

ai_video_generation_prompts.prompt: A clean establishing sequence of a Taiwanese university campus and learning space: exterior campus walkway in daylight, students walking in the distance, then a calm hallway or classroom entrance, ending on a clean background suitable for text overlay. The feeling is welcoming, academic, and professional. Realistic documentary style, stable camera, warm daylight, 16:9 horizontal video. Do not show official logos or emblems. Leave space in the center or lower third for the title text: National University of Tainan, Department of Computer Science and Information Engineering.
ai_video_generation_prompts.negative_prompt: no unauthorized logo, no close-up of identifiable strangers, no fake school emblem, no ranking claims, no English gibberish signs, no crowded commercial stock footage look
ai_video_generation_prompts.caption_overlay: 從程式設計出發，我們學習分析問題、拆解需求，並用技術做出清楚的解決方法。

ai_video_generation_prompts.prompt: A realistic montage showing computer science learning fields in a university environment: close-up of a laptop with sample code, a whiteboard with simple handwritten keywords AI, Data, System, Network, a notebook with a simple flowchart, and a student operating a clean demo interface or data visualization. Use smooth cuts between shots, bright classroom lighting, practical learning atmosphere, documentary promotional video style, 16:9 horizontal video. The scene should communicate programming, data, artificial intelligence, systems, networks, and applications without making rankings or equipment claims.
ai_video_generation_prompts.negative_prompt: no claim of top ranking, no fake laboratory equipment, no futuristic holograms, no private data, no unreadable corrupted text, no copyrighted textbook pages, no brand logos
ai_video_generation_prompts.caption_overlay: 課程不只是在寫程式，也包含資料處理、人工智慧、系統設計、網路與各種實際應用。

ai_video_generation_prompts.prompt: A warm university project teamwork scene: two or three students collaborate around a laptop, one student points at a screen showing a simple demo, another sketches a system diagram on a whiteboard, then a short presentation-style moment showing a prototype interface. Realistic Taiwanese university classroom or study room, natural expressions, cooperative atmosphere, soft daylight, steady medium shots and close-up inserts, 16:9 horizontal video. Keep screens generic and safe, with no confidential information.
ai_video_generation_prompts.negative_prompt: no identifiable real person likeness, no private project data, no copyrighted UI, no school logo, no exaggerated celebration, no high-five stock cliché, no distorted faces or hands
ai_video_generation_prompts.caption_overlay: 透過專題實作和團隊合作，我們把課堂上的知識轉換成可以展示、可以改進的作品。

ai_video_generation_prompts.prompt: A focused learning atmosphere sequence: close-up of a code editor or terminal with safe generic debug output, a paper checklist with simple tasks, students or hands revising a whiteboard diagram, and a final shot of running or saving code successfully. Realistic classroom desk setup, calm and determined mood, subtle camera movement, clean lighting, 16:9 horizontal video. The scene should show debugging, review, and improvement as part of learning.
ai_video_generation_prompts.negative_prompt: no API tokens, no usernames, no private file paths, no chat notifications, no error text containing real credentials, no chaotic screens, no cyber attack visuals
ai_video_generation_prompts.caption_overlay: 每一次討論、測試和除錯，都是累積經驗的過程，也讓作品更接近完成。

ai_video_generation_prompts.prompt: A clean closing shot for a university computer science promotional video: quiet campus walkway or empty classroom in warm daylight, or a laptop gently closing on a desk, followed by a simple minimal title card with space for text. Calm, positive, professional ending, slow fade out, 16:9 horizontal video. Use text-only identity, no official logo or emblem.
ai_video_generation_prompts.negative_prompt: no unauthorized logo, no fake emblem, no incorrect website URL, no busy background, no random text artifacts, no distorted campus signs
ai_video_generation_prompts.caption_overlay: 在這裡，我們用程式連結創意與實作，讓資訊能力成為面向未來的力量。

ai_generation_policy.disclosure_required: If AI-generated video clips are used in the final video, list the tool name, generation date, prompt summary, and usage rights in outputs/asset_sources.md.
ai_generation_policy.zero_paid_token_note: The repo still documents a zero-paid-token path through self-shot footage or Python/PIL fallback, so paid AI video generation is not a requirement.

fallback_plan: If campus footage is not available in time, use the existing Python/PIL generated video while keeping the same subtitles and timing.
